nested-conditionals.label: Nested Conditionals
nested-conditionals.summary: Learn about nested if statements and their applications.

q1.title: Implement a Nested If Statement
q1.prompt: Write a function that checks if a number is positive, negative, or zero using nested if statements.
q1.hint: Focus on the programming task being asked for, not on copying final solution text.

q4.title: Understanding Nested Conditionals
q4.prompt: Nested conditionals are used to evaluate multiple conditions in a structured way. They are essential for making decisions based on ______.
q4.hint: Think about what kind of criteria you might evaluate.

help.concept: Nested conditionals help in making decisions based on the missing term.
help.hint_1: Consider the types of decisions you make.
help.hint_2: What do you need to evaluate to make a decision?

q4.template: Nested conditionals are used to evaluate multiple conditions in a structured way. They are essential for making decisions based on {blank}.

q5.title: Identify Nested Conditionals
q5.prompt: Which of the following is an example of a nested conditional?
q5.hint: Look for an if statement inside another if statement.

help.concept: Nested conditionals involve placing one if statement inside another.
help.hint_1: Check for multiple layers of conditions.
help.hint_2: Identify the structure of the statements.

1.title: Understanding Nested Conditionals
1.bodyMarkdown: Nested conditionals allow you to evaluate multiple conditions in a structured way. They are essential for making decisions based on complex criteria.
